verses.latin_vulgate: Omnis autem populus Juda filium ejus Oziam, annorum sedecim, constituit regem pro Amasia patre suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְח֞וּ כׇּל־עַ֤ם יְהוּדָה֙ אֶת־עֻזִּיָּ֔הוּ וְה֕וּא בֶּן־שֵׁ֥שׁ עֶשְׂרֵ֖ה שָׁנָ֑ה וַיַּמְלִ֣יכוּ אֹת֔וֹ תַּ֖חַת אָבִ֥יו אֲמַצְיָֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the people of Juda took his son Ozias, who was sixteen years old, and made him king in the room of Amasias his father.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta koko Juudan kansa otti Ussian, joka oli kuudentoistakymmenen ajastaikainen, ja asettivat hänen kuninkaaksi isänsä Amatsian siaan.
verses.king_james: Then all the people of Judah took Uzziah, who was sixteen years old, and made him king in the room of his father Amaziah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse ædificavit Ailath, et restituit eam ditioni Juda, postquam dormivit rex cum patribus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֚וּא בָּנָ֣ה אֶת־אֵיל֔וֹת וַיְשִׁיבֶ֖הָ לִֽיהוּדָ֑ה אַחֲרֵ֥י שְׁכַֽב־הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ עִם־אֲבֹתָֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: He built Ailath, and restored it to the dominion of Juda, after that the king slept with his fathers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän rakensi Elotin, ja saatti sen jälleen Juudalle, sitte kuin kuningas oli nukkunut isäinsä kanssa.
verses.king_james: He built Eloth, and restored it to Judah, after that the king slept with his fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sedecim annorum erat Ozias cum regnare cœpisset, et quinquaginta duobus annis regnavit in Jerusalem : nomen matris ejus Jechelia de Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־שֵׁ֨שׁ עֶשְׂרֵ֤ה שָׁנָה֙ עֻזִּיָּ֣הוּ בְמׇלְכ֔וֹ וַחֲמִשִּׁ֤ים וּשְׁתַּ֙יִם֙ שָׁנָ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְשֵׁ֣ם אִמּ֔וֹ (יכיליה) [יְכׇלְיָ֖ה] מִן־יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Ozias was sixteen years old when he began to reign, and he reigned two and fifty years in Jerusalem: the name of his mother was Jechelia of Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuudentoistakymmenen vuotinen oli Ussia tullessansa kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi kaksi ajastaikaa kuudettakymmentä Jerusalemissa. Ja hänen äitinsä nimi oli Jekolia Jerusalemista.
verses.king_james: Sixteen years old was Uzziah when he began to reign, and he reigned fifty and two years in Jerusalem. His mother’s name also was Jecoliah of Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque quod erat rectum in oculis Domini, juxta omnia quæ fecerat Amasias pater ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הַיָּשָׁ֖ר בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כְּכֹ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֖ה אֲמַצְיָ֥הוּ אָבִֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did that which was right in the eyes of the Lord, according to all that Amasias his father had done.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki, mitä otollinen oli Herran edessä, kaiketi niinkuin hänen isänsä Amatsia oli tehnyt.
verses.king_james: And he did that which was right in the sight of the Lord, according to all that his father Amaziah did.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et exquisivit Dominum in diebus Zachariæ intelligentis et videntis Deum : cumque requireret Dominum, direxit eum in omnibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ לִדְרֹ֣שׁ אֱלֹהִ֔ים בִּימֵ֣י זְכַרְיָ֔הוּ הַמֵּבִ֖ין בִּרְאֹ֣ת הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וּבִימֵי֙ דׇּרְשׁ֣וֹ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֔ה הִצְלִיח֖וֹ הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he sought the Lord in the days of Zacharias that understood and saw God: and as long as he sought the Lord, he directed him in all things.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän etsi Jumalaa, niinkauvan kuin Sakaria eli, opettaja Jumalan näyissä. Ja niinkauvan kuin hän etsi Herraa, antoi Jumala hänen menestyä.
verses.king_james: And he sought God in the days of Zechariah, who had understanding in the visions of God: and as long as he sought the Lord, God made him to prosper.

verses.latin_vulgate: Denique egressus est, et pugnavit contra Philisthiim, et destruxit murum Geth, et murum Jabniæ, murumque Azoti : ædificavit quoque oppida in Azoto et in Philisthiim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵא֙ וַיִּלָּ֣חֶם בַּפְּלִשְׁתִּ֔ים וַיִּפְרֹ֞ץ אֶת־ח֣וֹמַת גַּ֗ת וְאֵת֙ חוֹמַ֣ת יַבְנֵ֔ה וְאֵ֖ת חוֹמַ֣ת אַשְׁדּ֑וֹד וַיִּבְנֶ֣ה עָרִ֔ים בְּאַשְׁדּ֖וֹד וּבַפְּלִשְׁתִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover he went forth and fought against the Philistines, and broke down the wall of Geth, and the wall of Jabnia, and the wall of Azotus: and he built towns in Azotus, and among the Philistines.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hän läksi ja soti Philistealaisia vastaan, ja kukisti Gatin muurin, ja Jabnen muurin, ja Asdodin muurin, ja rakensi kaupungeita Asdodin ympärille ja Philistealaisten keskelle;
verses.king_james: And he went forth and warred against the Philistines, and brake down the wall of Gath, and the wall of Jabneh, and the wall of Ashdod, and built cities about Ashdod, and among the Philistines.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et adjuvit eum Deus contra Philisthiim, et contra Arabes qui habitabant in Gurbaal, et contra Ammonitas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעְזְרֵ֨הוּ הָאֱלֹהִ֜ים עַל־פְּלִשְׁתִּ֧ים וְעַל־[הָעַרְבִ֛ים] (הערביים) הַיֹּשְׁבִ֥ים בְּגוּר־בָּ֖עַל וְהַמְּעוּנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And God helped him against the Philistines, and against the Arabians, that dwelt in Gurbaal, and against the Ammonites.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Jumala autti häntä Philistealaisia, Arabialaisia, Gurbaalin asuvia ja Meunilaisia vastaan.
verses.king_james: And God helped him against the Philistines, and against the Arabians that dwelt in Gur–baal, and the Mehunims.

verses.latin_vulgate: Appendebantque Ammonitæ munera Oziæ : et divulgatum est nomen ejus usque ad introitum Ægypti propter crebras victorias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְּנ֧וּ הָעַמּוֹנִ֛ים מִנְחָ֖ה לְעֻזִּיָּ֑הוּ וַיֵּ֤לֶךְ שְׁמוֹ֙ עַד־לְב֣וֹא מִצְרַ֔יִם כִּ֥י הֶחֱזִ֖יק עַד־לְמָֽעְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Ammonites gave gifts to Ozias: and his name was spread abroad even to the entrance of Egypt for his frequent victories.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ammonilaiset antoivat Ussialle lahjoja; ja hän tuli kuuluisaksi hamaan siihen saakka, josta Egyptiin mennään; sillä hän tuli aina väkevämmäksi.
verses.king_james: And the Ammonites gave gifts to Uzziah: and his name spread abroad even to the entering in of Egypt; for he strengthened himself exceedingly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ædificavitque Ozias turres in Jerusalem super portam anguli, et super portam vallis, et reliquas in eodem muri latere, firmavitque eas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֨בֶן עֻזִּיָּ֤הוּ מִגְדָּלִים֙ בִּיר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם עַל־שַׁ֧עַר הַפִּנָּ֛ה וְעַל־שַׁ֥עַר הַגַּ֖יְא וְעַל־הַמִּקְצ֑וֹעַ וַֽיְחַזְּקֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ozias built towers in Jerusalem over the gate of the corner, and over the gate of the valley, and the rest, in the same side of the wall, and fortified them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ussia rakensi tornit Jerusalemissa Kulmaportin ja Laaksoportin päälle, ja muihin kulmiin, ja vahvisti niitä.
verses.king_james: Moreover Uzziah built towers in Jerusalem at the corner gate, and at the valley gate, and at the turning of the wall, and fortified them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exstruxit etiam turres in solitudine, et effodit cisternas plurimas, eo quod haberet multa pecora tam in campestribus quam in eremi vastitate : vineas quoque habuit et vinitores, in montibus et in Carmelo : erat quippe homo agriculturæ deditus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֨בֶן מִגְדָּלִ֜ים בַּמִּדְבָּ֗ר וַיַּחְצֹב֙ בֹּר֣וֹת רַבִּ֔ים כִּ֤י מִקְנֶה־רַּב֙ הָ֣יָה ל֔וֹ וּבַשְּׁפֵלָ֖ה וּבַמִּישׁ֑וֹר אִכָּרִ֣ים וְכֹרְמִ֗ים בֶּהָרִים֙ וּבַכַּרְמֶ֔ל כִּי־אֹהֵ֥ב אֲדָמָ֖ה הָיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he built towers in the wilderness, and dug many cisterns, for he had much cattle both in the plains, and in the waste of the desert: he had also vineyards and dressers of vines in the mountains, and in Carmel: for he was a man that loved husbandry.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän rakensi torneja myös korpeen ja kaivoi monta kaivoa; sillä hänellä oli paljo karjaa laaksoissa ja tasaisella kedolla, ja peltomiehiä ja viinamiehiä vuorilla ja Karmelissa; sillä hän rakasti peltoja.
verses.king_james: Also he built towers in the desert, and digged many wells: for he had much cattle, both in the low country, and in the plains: husbandmen also, and vine dressers in the mountains, and in Carmel: for he loved husbandry.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuit autem exercitus bellatorum ejus, qui procedebant ad prælia sub manu Jehiel scribæ, Maasiæque doctoris, et sub manu Hananiæ, qui erat de ducibus regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י לְעֻזִּיָּ֡הוּ חַ֩יִל֩ עֹשֵׂ֨ה מִלְחָמָ֜ה יוֹצְאֵ֧י צָבָ֣א לִגְד֗וּד בְּמִסְפַּר֙ פְּקֻדָּתָ֔ם בְּיַד֙ (יעואל) [יְעִיאֵ֣ל] הַסּוֹפֵ֔ר וּמַעֲשֵׂיָ֖הוּ הַשּׁוֹטֵ֑ר עַ֚ל יַד־חֲנַנְיָ֔הוּ מִשָּׂרֵ֖י הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the army of his fighting men, that went out to war, was under the hand of Jehiel the scribe, and Maasias the doctor, and under the hand of Henanias, who was one of the king's captains.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ussialla oli myös hyvin harjoitettu sotajoukko, jotka sotaan menivät joukottain, heidän lukunsa jälkeen, niinkuin he olivat luetut Jejelin kirjoittajan ja Maesejan virkamiehen kautta, Hananian käden alla, joka oli kuninkaan päämiehiä.
verses.king_james: Moreover Uzziah had an host of fighting men, that went out to war by bands, according to the number of their account by the hand of Jeiel the scribe and Maaseiah the ruler, under the hand of Hananiah, one of the king’s captains.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnisque numerus principum per familias, virorum fortium duorum millium sexcentorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֠ל מִסְפַּ֞ר רָאשֵׁ֤י הָאָבוֹת֙ לְגִבּ֣וֹרֵי חָ֔יִל אַלְפַּ֖יִם וְשֵׁ֥שׁ מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the whole number of the chiefs by the families of valiant men were two thousand six hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ylimmäisten isäin luku väkevistä sotamiehistä oli kaksituhatta ja kuusisataa,
verses.king_james: The whole number of the chief of the fathers of the mighty men of valour were two thousand and six hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sub eis universus exercitus trecentorum et septem millium quingentorum, qui erant apti ad bella, et pro rege contra adversarios dimicabant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַל־יָדָם֩ חֵ֨יל צָבָ֜א שְׁלֹ֧שׁ מֵא֣וֹת אֶ֗לֶף וְשִׁבְעַ֤ת אֲלָפִים֙ וַחֲמֵ֣שׁ מֵא֔וֹת עוֹשֵׂ֥י מִלְחָמָ֖ה בְּכֹ֣חַ חָ֑יִל לַעְזֹ֥ר לַמֶּ֖לֶךְ עַל־הָאוֹיֵֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the whole army under them three hundred and seven thousand five hundred: who were fit for war, and fought for the king against the enemy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän allansa sotajoukko kolmesataa tuhatta ja seitsemäntuhatta, ja viisisataa väkevää ja urhoollista sotamiestä, joiden piti kuningasta auttaman vihamiehiä vastaan.
verses.king_james: And under their hand was an army, three hundred thousand and seven thousand and five hundred, that made war with mighty power, to help the king against the enemy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præparavit quoque eis Ozias, id est, cuncto exercitui, clypeos, et hastas, et galeas, et loricas, arcusque et fundas ad jaciendos lapides.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֩כֶן֩ לָהֶ֨ם עֻזִּיָּ֜הוּ לְכׇל־הַצָּבָ֗א מָגִנִּ֤ים וּרְמָחִים֙ וְכ֣וֹבָעִ֔ים וְשִׁרְיֹנ֖וֹת וּקְשָׁת֑וֹת וּלְאַבְנֵ֖י קְלָעִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ozias prepared for them, that is, for the whole army, shields, and spears, and helmets, and coats of mail, and bows, and slings to cast stones.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ussia valmisti koko sotajoukolle kilpiä ja keihäitä, rautalakkeja ja rautapaitoja, joutsia ja vielä kiviäkin linkoja varten.
verses.king_james: And Uzziah prepared for them throughout all the host shields, and spears, and helmets, and habergeons, and bows, and slings to cast stones.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit in Jerusalem diversi generis machinas, quas in turribus collocavit et in angulis murorum, ut mitterent sagittas, et saxa grandia : egressumque est nomen ejus procul, eo quod auxiliaretur ei Dominus, et corroborasset illum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣עַשׂ ׀ בִּירוּשָׁלַ֨͏ִם חִשְּׁבֹנ֜וֹת מַחֲשֶׁ֣בֶת חוֹשֵׁ֗ב לִהְי֤וֹת עַל־הַמִּגְדָּלִים֙ וְעַל־הַפִּנּ֔וֹת לִירוֹא֙ בַּחִצִּ֔ים וּבָאֲבָנִ֖ים גְּדֹל֑וֹת וַיֵּצֵ֤א שְׁמוֹ֙ עַד־לְמֵ֣רָח֔וֹק כִּֽי־הִפְלִ֥יא לְהֵעָזֵ֖ר עַ֥ד כִּֽי־חָזָֽק׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made in Jerusalem engines of diverse kinds, which he placed in the towers, and in the corners of the walls, to shoot arrows, and great stones: and his name went forth far abroad, for the Lord helped him, and had strengthened him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän teki myös Jerusalemissa varustukset sangen taitavasti, jotka piti oleman tornein päällä ja kulmain päällä, joista piti ammuttaman nuolilla ja suurilla kivillä. Ja hänen sanomansa kuului sangen leviälle; sillä hän tuli ihmeellisesti autetuksi, siihen asti että hän väkeväksi tuli.
verses.king_james: And he made in Jerusalem engines, invented by cunning men, to be on the towers and upon the bulwarks, to shoot arrows and great stones withal. And his name spread far abroad; for he was marvellously helped, till he was strong.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed cum roboratus esset, elevatum est cor ejus in interitum suum, et neglexit Dominum Deum suum : ingressusque templum Domini, adolere voluit incensum super altare thymiamatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְחֶזְקָת֗וֹ גָּבַ֤הּ לִבּוֹ֙ עַד־לְהַשְׁחִ֔ית וַיִּמְעַ֖ל בַּיהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֑יו וַיָּבֹא֙ אֶל־הֵיכַ֣ל יְהֹוָ֔ה לְהַקְטִ֖יר עַל־מִזְבַּ֥ח הַקְּטֹֽרֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: But when he was made strong, his heart was lifted up to his destruction, and he neglected the Lord his God: and going into the temple of the Lord, he had a mind to burn incense upon the altar of incense.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin hän oli väkeväksi tullut, paisui hänen sydämensä omaksi kadotukseksensa, ja rikkoi Herraa Jumalaansa vastaan, ja meni Herran templiin sisälle, suitsuttamaan pyhän savun alttarilla.
verses.king_james: But when he was strong, his heart was lifted up to his destruction: for he transgressed against the Lord his God, and went into the temple of the Lord to burn incense upon the altar of incense.

verses.latin_vulgate: Statimque ingressus post eum Azarias sacerdos, et cum eo sacerdotes Domini octoginta, viri fortissimi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֥א אַחֲרָ֖יו עֲזַרְיָ֣הוּ הַכֹּהֵ֑ן וְעִמּ֞וֹ כֹּהֲנִ֧ים ׀ לַיהֹוָ֛ה שְׁמוֹנִ֖ים בְּנֵי־חָֽיִל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And immediately Azarias the priest going in after him, and with him fourscore priests of the Lord, most valiant men,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Asaria pappi meni hänen perässänsä, ja hänen kanssansa kahdeksankymmentä Herran pappia, väkeviä miehiä,
verses.king_james: And Azariah the priest went in after him, and with him fourscore priests of the Lord, that were valiant men:

verses.latin_vulgate: restiterunt regi, atque dixerunt : Non est tui officii, Ozia, ut adoleas incensum Domino, sed sacerdotum, hoc est, filiorum Aaron, qui consecrati sunt ad hujuscemodi ministerium : egredere de sanctuario, ne contempseris : quia non reputabitur tibi in gloriam hoc a Domino Deo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעַמְד֞וּ עַל־עֻזִּיָּ֣הוּ הַמֶּ֗לֶךְ וַיֹּ֤אמְרוּ לוֹ֙ לֹֽא־לְךָ֣ עֻזִּיָּ֗הוּ לְהַקְטִיר֙ לַיהֹוָ֔ה כִּ֣י לַכֹּהֲנִ֧ים בְּנֵֽי־אַהֲרֹ֛ן הַמְקֻדָּשִׁ֖ים לְהַקְטִ֑יר צֵ֤א מִן־הַמִּקְדָּשׁ֙ כִּ֣י מָעַ֔לְתָּ וְלֹֽא־לְךָ֥ לְכָב֖וֹד מֵיְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Withstood the king and said: It doth not belong to thee, Ozias, to burn incense to the Lord, but to the priests, that is, to the sons of Aaron, who are consecrated for this ministry: go out of the sanctuary, do not despise: for this thing shall not be accounted to thy glory by the Lord God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja seisoivat kuningas Ussiaa vastaan ja sanoivat hänelle: Ussia, ei sinun sovi suitsuttaa Herralle, vaan pappein, Aaronin poikain, jotka ovat pyhitetyt suitsuttamaan: mene ulos pyhästä, sinä olet väärin tehnyt, ei se tule sinulle kunniaksi Herran Jumalan edessä.
verses.king_james: And they withstood Uzziah the king, and said unto him, It appertaineth not unto thee, Uzziah, to burn incense unto the Lord, but to the priests the sons of Aaron, that are consecrated to burn incense: go out of the sanctuary; for thou hast trespassed; neither shall it be for thine honour from the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Iratusque Ozias, tenens in manu thuribulum ut adoleret incensum, minabatur sacerdotibus. Statimque orta est lepra in fronte ejus coram sacerdotibus, in domo Domini super altare thymiamatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּזְעַף֙ עֻזִּיָּ֔הוּ וּבְיָד֥וֹ מִקְטֶ֖רֶת לְהַקְטִ֑יר וּבְזַעְפּ֣וֹ עִם־הַכֹּהֲנִ֗ים וְ֠הַצָּרַ֠עַת זָרְחָ֨ה בְמִצְח֜וֹ לִפְנֵ֤י הַכֹּֽהֲנִים֙ בְּבֵ֣ית יְהֹוָ֔ה מֵעַ֖ל לְמִזְבַּ֥ח הַקְּטֹֽרֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ozias was angry, and holding in his hand the censer to burn incense, threatened the priests. And presently there rose a leprosy in his forehead before the priests, in the house of the Lord at the altar of incense.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Ussia vihastui, ja piti kädessänsä pyhän savun astian suitsuttaaksensa. Vaan kuin hän vihastui pappeja vastaan, kävi spitali hänen otsastansa ulos pappein edessä Herran huoneessa, pyhän savun alttarin edessä.
verses.king_james: Then Uzziah was wroth, and had a censer in his hand to burn incense: and while he was wroth with the priests, the leprosy even rose up in his forehead before the priests in the house of the Lord, from beside the incense altar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque respexisset eum Azarias pontifex, et omnes reliqui sacerdotes, viderunt lepram in fronte ejus, et festinato expulerunt eum. Sed et ipse perterritus, acceleravit egredi, eo quod sensisset illico plagam Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֣פֶן אֵלָ֡יו עֲזַרְיָ֩הוּ֩ כֹהֵ֨ן הָרֹ֜אשׁ וְכׇל־הַכֹּהֲנִ֗ים וְהִנֵּה־ה֤וּא מְצֹרָע֙ בְּמִצְח֔וֹ וַיַּבְהִל֖וּהוּ מִשָּׁ֑ם וְגַם־הוּא֙ נִדְחַ֣ף לָצֵ֔את כִּ֥י נִגְּע֖וֹ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Azarias the high priest, and all the rest of the priests looked upon him, and saw the leprosy in his forehead, and they made haste to thrust him out. Yea himself also being frightened, hasted to go out, because he had quickly felt the stroke of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin katsoi ylimmäinen pappi Asaria hänen puoleensa, ja kaikki muut papit, ja katso, hän oli spitalinen otsassansa. Ja he hoputtivat hänen sieltä ulos, ja hän riensi myös itsekin; sillä hän oli Herralta rangaistu.
verses.king_james: And Azariah the chief priest, and all the priests, looked upon him, and, behold, he was leprous in his forehead, and they thrust him out from thence; yea, himself hasted also to go out, because the Lord had smitten him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuit igitur Ozias rex leprosus usque ad diem mortis suæ, et habitavit in domo separata plenus lepra, ob quam ejectus fuerat de domo Domini. Porro Joatham filius ejus rexit domum regis, et judicabat populum terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִי֩ עֻזִּיָּ֨הוּ הַמֶּ֜לֶךְ מְצֹרָ֣ע ׀ עַד־י֣וֹם מוֹת֗וֹ וַיֵּ֜שֶׁב בֵּ֤ית (החפשות) [הַֽחׇפְשִׁית֙] מְצֹרָ֔ע כִּ֥י נִגְזַ֖ר מִבֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה וְיוֹתָ֤ם בְּנוֹ֙ עַל־בֵּ֣ית הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ שׁוֹפֵ֖ט אֶת־עַ֥ם הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ozias the king was a leper unto the day of his death, and he dwelt in a house apart being full of the leprosy, for which he had been cast out of the house of the Lord. And Joatham his son governed the king's house, and judged the people of the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niin oli kuningas Ussia spitalinen hamaan kuolemaansa asti, ja asui erinäisessä huoneessa spitalisena, sillä hän oli eroitettu Herran huoneesta. Mutta Jotam hänen poikansa hallitsi kuninkaan huoneen ja tuomitsi kansaa maalla.
verses.king_james: And Uzziah the king was a leper unto the day of his death, and dwelt in a several house, being a leper; for he was cut off from the house of the Lord: and Jotham his son was over the king’s house, judging the people of the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Oziæ priorum et novissimorum scripsit Isaias filius Amos propheta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֙תֶר֙ דִּבְרֵ֣י עֻזִּיָּ֔הוּ הָרִאשֹׁנִ֖ים וְהָאַחֲרֹנִ֑ים כָּתַ֛ב יְשַֽׁעְיָ֥הוּ בֶן־אָמ֖וֹץ הַנָּבִֽיא׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the rest of the acts of Ozias first and last were written by Isaias the son of Amos, the prophet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempää Ussian menoista sanomista on, sekä ensimäisistä että viimeisistä, on propheta Jesaia Amotsin poika kirjoittanut.
verses.king_james: Now the rest of the acts of Uzziah, first and last, did Isaiah the prophet, the son of Amoz, write.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dormivitque Ozias cum patribus suis, et sepelierunt eum in agro regalium sepulchrorum, eo quod esset leprosus : regnavitque Joatham filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכַּ֨ב עֻזִּיָּ֜הוּ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֗יו וַיִּקְבְּר֨וּ אֹת֤וֹ עִם־אֲבֹתָיו֙ בִּשְׂדֵ֤ה הַקְּבוּרָה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לַמְּלָכִ֔ים כִּ֥י אָמְר֖וּ מְצוֹרָ֣ע ה֑וּא וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ יוֹתָ֥ם בְּנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Ozias slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the field of the royal sepulchres, because he was a leper: and Joatham his son reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ussia nukkui isäinsä kanssa, ja he hautasivat hänen isäinsä kanssa kuningasten hautapeltoon; sillä he sanoivat: hän on spitalinen. Ja Jotam hänen poikansa tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: So Uzziah slept with his fathers, and they buried him with his fathers in the field of the burial which belonged to the kings; for they said, He is a leper: and Jotham his son reigned in his stead.
